breaches.message: artifact retention policy review が期限超過です。

issue.title: [evaluation-threshold-alert] ae-framework evaluation threshold breached
issue.body:
## ae-framework Evaluation Threshold Breach

Latest ae-framework evaluation metrics are below configured thresholds.

- detectedAt: 2026-04-08T18:34:45.954Z
- summaryPath: reports/ae-framework-runs-summary.json
- latestRunId: 24151608991
- latestRunAttempt: 1
- latestRunGeneratedAt: 2026-04-08T18:34:45Z
- runCount: 87
- score: 100
- rating: A
- formalReady: 4 / 4
- formalHealthy: 4 / 4

### Thresholds

- minRunCount: 1
- minScore: 90
- minRating: A
- minFormalReady: 4
- minFormalHealthy: 4
- requirePolicyValid: true
- requirePreserveAllArtifacts: true
- requireReviewNotOverdue: true

### Breaches

- review_overdue: expected false, actual true

### Required Action

1. Inspect latest run artifacts and evaluation report for root cause.
2. Restore formal verification health and/or evaluation score.
3. Re-run autopilot and confirm thresholds are satisfied.

### Tracking Key

- uniqueKey: [evaluation-threshold-alert]
<!-- evaluation-threshold-alert-key: [evaluation-threshold-alert] -->
issue.closeComment:
ae-framework evaluation is back within configured thresholds.

- resolvedAt: 2026-04-08T18:34:45.954Z
- summaryPath: reports/ae-framework-runs-summary.json
Auto-closing this tracking issue.
